results.title: Alliance: Uorfi Javed slams Kushal Tandon, defends sister Dolly; says, ‘His biggest achievement is being someone’s ex’
results.description: Uorfi Javed strongly criticized Kushal Tandon's actions on The Alliance reality show. She defended her sister Dolly Javed, stating she behaved respectfully during their argument. Javed questioned Tandon's participation if he felt superior to other contestants. She also commented on his past behavior and career achievements, calling him average. Javed suggested Tandon might be a narcissist based on ex-girlfriends' statements.

results.title: Indian Super League secures full season after clubs win rights deal
results.description: India's top football league will resume with a full season after a year of uncertainty. Clubs will now manage commercial operations, including sponsorship and marketing rights. The All India Football Federation will retain administrative authority over the Indian Super League. The 2026-27 season is scheduled to begin on September 4 in a home and away format. This new agreement aims to revitalize Indian football and attract new audiences.
